Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rita Howell, Bailiff: A. Cruz.
Natalie Nuttall, Esq. for Plaintiff: R.C. Market Holdings, L.P., a Delaware Limited Partnership.
Plaintiff's Witness: Norma Vigil, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: William Lane as follows:
Damages $101,349.18
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.

July 21, 2006
Proposed Judgment received in court, granted and signed by VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire.
